summary: Executed backend API pytest suite and frontend Playwright flows for home, predict, dashboard, and route responsiveness. All requested flows passed against public preview URL.
critical_code_review_comments: No critical code issues found in reviewed files for env usage, response modeling, async DB operations, or route integration.
data-testid coverage for critical interactive UI elements is strong and testable.
seed_data_creation: No manual seed data created; prediction records were generated via /api/predict during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview endpoint validated. Pytest results available in /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Frontend flows validated via browser automation on desktop and mobile viewport with successful prediction persistence into dashboard.
rca of the issue: No blocking issue reproduced in this iteration.
test_credentials: No login/auth required as documented in /app/memory/test_credentials.md
